name: Plugin System
description: Implement a plugin system with two modules. The plugin_base module defines the Plugin abstract base class and Hook types. The plugin_manager module implements a PluginManager that registers plugins, manages lifecycle (enable/disable), and dispatches hooks with a pipeline pattern (each plugin can modify data before passing to the next).
constraints: Plugins are registered by instance, identified by name
dispatch_hook calls method with matching hook_name on enabled plugins
Pipeline: each plugin receives data from previous plugin's HookResult
Disabled plugins are skipped in dispatch
